Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Homer J. Olsen, Inc.
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Homer J. Olsen, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576. Telephone: 530-339-5023.

Michael Espinosa, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Robert Lewis, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Homer J. Olsen, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on May 15, 2015.
Statement of Damages was filed and served on May 14, 2015.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on January 8, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Michael Rhodes and against the Defaulted Defendant Homer J. Olsen, Inc., as follows:

Economic Damages - $81,250.00.
Non-Economic Damages - $750,000.00.
Total - $831,250.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

RULING:
DEFENDANT TUTOR-SALIBA CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Tutor-Saliba Corporation's demurrer to the third cause of action alleged in plaintiff's complaint is overruled. Defendant failed to demonstrate that plaintiff's complaint fails for uncertainty or fails to state a cause of action against defendant. The Court will not take judicial notice of the Articles of Incorporation attached by defendant. The Court will not take judicial notice of the website printout attached by plaintiff. Defendant has 10 days to answer. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Kim Richardson of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #5915 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
